title: S&P 500 Stocks With the Most Upside
text: Wall Street analysts forecast these names to deliver the biggest price gains in the S&P 500 over the next 12 months.

title: Wall Street's top 5 stocks with the biggest upside in 2024
text: With the possibility of an interest rate cut by the FED and fairly optimistic targets for the S&P 500 index by the largest analytical groups, investors might be looking for the best opportunities in the stock market for the upcoming 2024.

title: APA Corporation Declares Cash Dividend on Common Shares
text: HOUSTON, Dec. 12, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The board of directors of APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) has declared a regular cash dividend on the company's common shares.

title: Apache Corporation Partners with Borderlands Research Institute on Well Pad Restoration Research Project in the Permian Basin
text: HOUSTON, Dec. 11, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Apache Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) today announced a partnership with the Borderlands Research Institute (BRI) at Sul Ross State University in Alpine, Texas, to launch a well pad restoration research project. Through this multiyear partnership, researchers at BRI and Texas Native Seeds, a project of the Caesar Kleberg Wildlife Research Institute at Texas A&M Kingsville, will investigate methods to improve habitat restoration efforts in the Permian Basin with the goal of publishing a science-backed, best practices reclamation document to be shared with other Permian operators.

title: Analysts Predict These Will Be Next Year's Top 10 Stocks
text: Want to own the top S&P 500 stock of 2024? It's not going to be Nvidia again — and it won't even be in the top 10, analysts say.

title: 3 Crude Oil Stocks To Buy Now
text: Crude oil prices have been in a downturn, down 27% from recent highs, but technical indicators suggest the bottom may be near. The US may soon replenish its strategic oil reserves, providing support for oil prices. Geopolitical threats and a potential shift in the Fed's monetary stance could also contribute to higher oil prices in the future.

title: APA Corporation: Opportunistic Bottom-Fishing In The Oil Patch
text: Disciplined approach to CAPEX is a key driver to capital efficiency going forward. Focus on debt reduction and growth of returns-on-investments is net positive for the balance sheet. Despite lower commodity prices, APA's current share price offers attractive level to initiate or add to positions.

title: Why Is APA (APA) Down 9.3% Since Last Earnings Report?
